decks.notes: The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By using cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, you can quickly deal damage and put pressure on your opponent. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Goblin Bombardment provides additional reach and versatility in handling various threats. The deck aims to establish board control early on and maintain a steady stream of damage to close out games swiftly.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. The deck also utilizes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment for additional damage. The inclusion of cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Guide of Souls helps to maintain card advantage and board presence. Other cards like Thraben Charm and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provide additional utility and removal options. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with early pressure and efficient threats.

This Boros aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays to quickly overwhelm opponents. With a mix of efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls alongside burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment, the aim is to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like The Legend of Roku and Arena of Glory provide additional support and consistency to keep the pressure on the opponent. Blood Moon and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah are included to disrupt opponent strategies and secure the win.

This deck aims to quickly ramp up mana using Birthing Ritual and Coiling Oracle to play powerful creatures like Shardless Agent and Ice-Fang Coatl. It also includes disruptive elements like Subtlety and Sink into Stupor to control the board and keep opponents on the back foot. The combination of aggressive creatures, mana acceleration, and disruption spells allows the deck to maintain pressure on opponents while controlling the game tempo. With a mix of aggression and control, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents and secure victory through a combination of brute force and strategic finesse.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and applying pressure to the opponent quickly. It includes powerful cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Scion of Draco to deal damage efficiently. Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding provide additional support to the creatures on the board. The inclusion of Lightning Bolt gives the deck extra reach to finish off opponents. The deck also has some control elements like Stubborn Denial and Consign to Memory to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful aggro strategy.

This deck focuses on aggressively attacking the opponent with a mix of powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd while using blink effects like Ephemerate to protect them and generate additional value. Consign to Memory allows for flexibility in dealing with threats or drawing cards. Quantum Riddler and Prismatic Ending provide additional removal options. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy, with fetch lands like Arid Mesa and Scalding Tarn to ensure consistency in casting spells. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of creatures and disruptive spells.

This deck focuses on using a combination of counterspells, disruptive cards, and combo pieces to quickly assemble the Goblin Charbelcher win condition. By utilizing cards like Lotus Bloom, Disrupting Shoal, and Whir of Invention, the deck aims to efficiently ramp up mana and control the board until it can play Charbelcher and activate it for a game-winning amount of damage. The deck aims to create a fast and resilient win condition without relying on traditional land drops, making it a unique and powerful combo deck in the Modern format.

This deck focuses on using Birthing Ritual to ramp up mana quickly and generate advantage through card draw and creature abilities. It aims to overwhelm opponents with a mix of aggressive creatures like Shardless Agent and Ice-Fang Coatl, while also disrupting their strategies with counterspells like Force of Negation and Flare of Denial. The deck also includes versatile creatures like Coiling Oracle and Endurance to adapt to various situations. The combination of mana ramp, card advantage, and disruption allows the deck to maintain pressure and control the pace of the game.

The main concept of this Modern Aggro - Affinity deck is to quickly flood the board with artifacts and creatures to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. The deck features cards that allow for early resource generation and mana acceleration, as well as various ways to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By combining artifact synergies, efficient low-cost creatures, and powerful spells like Engineered Explosives and Thoughtcast, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence and apply constant pressure on the opponent to secure a quick victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of aggressive creatures and flickering effects to maintain board presence and apply pressure on the opponent. By blinking creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd with cards like Consign to Memory and Ephemerate, the deck aims to create repeated value and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the deck includes powerful threats like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and efficient removal spells like Solitude and Wrath of the Skies to control the battlefield and secure victory through aggressive tactics.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly cycle through cards and fill up the graveyard with creatures in order to cast Living End, a powerful sorcery that brings all creatures back from the graveyard onto the battlefield. Various cards in the deck help enable this strategy, such as Street Wraith, Endurance, and Overlord of the Balemurk. By prioritizing cycling and graveyard manipulation, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a sudden wave of creatures, leading to a powerful combo finish.

The deck focuses on using artifacts and creatures with modular abilities to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a large board presence. By utilizing cards like Arcbound Ravager and Mox Opal, the deck can generate a lot of mana and play multiple threats in a single turn. Cards like Krang, Master Mind and Mishra's Bauble provide additional card advantage and disruption. The deck also includes removal, such as Shadowspear and Engineered Explosives, to deal with opposing threats. The goal is to beat down the opponent quickly and efficiently through a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays combined with burn spells and removal to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The key strategy is to efficiently use low-cost creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, alongside powerful cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to deal damage quickly. Cards like Goblin Bombardment and Thraben Charm provide additional utility and flexibility in combat, while cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Elegant Parlor help maintain card advantage. The deck also includes disruption elements like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Blood Moon to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly putting pressure on the opponent with low-cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, backed up by direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart. The deck also includes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration to help maintain card advantage and filter through the deck for key spells. The goal is to outpace the opponent and quickly close out the game before they have a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on utilizing a variety of creatures to create a toolbox of options for different situations. By efficiently tutoring for specific creatures with cards like Chord of Calling, players can adapt to the game state and combo off with cards like Birthing Ritual. The deck also includes protection spells like Sylvan Safekeeper and Boseiju, Who Endures to ensure its combos go off smoothly. Overall, this deck aims to assemble creature combos while controlling the board with a variety of toolbox options.

This deck focuses on aggressive play with a mixture of different colored creatures and spells to overwhelm the opponent quickly. It utilizes powerful creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Scion of Draco to deal damage, while also using Leyline of the Guildpact to protect them. The inclusion of versatile spells like Lightning Bolt and Stubborn Denial provide control options, while cards like Consign to Memory and Teferi, Time Raveler offer additional utility. The mana base is well-rounded with fetch lands and various dual lands to ensure consistent casting of spells.
